news.title: Police accuse 19-year-old of driving drunk, killing his passenger in high-speed crash
news.summary: A Gwinnett County teenager is charged with homicide after police say he was drunk and speeding when his truck rolled, killing his 19-year-old passenger on Highway 316.

news.title: Monroe County man gets life for stabbing roommate 20 times
news.summary: Triston James Sexton received a life sentence after pleading guilty to the 2024 stabbing murder of his sober-living roommate, David Courtney Phelps, inside a Woodstock apartment.

news.title: Henry County police seek suspect in June murder case
news.summary: Henry County police have issued murder warrants for Darius Reeves Jr., wanted in the fatal June shooting of Charvis Buckholts.

news.title: Newnan man still missing after 2 months, family asks for help
news.summary: A 400-acre search along the Chattahoochee River has turned up no clues for Malik Polk, a 25-year-old Newnan man who has been missing for nearly two months after vanishing into the woods in Carroll Cou

news.title: Police searching for armed robbery suspects, accused carjackers in metro Atlanta
news.summary: The Gwinnett County Police Department is searching for armed robbery suspects they say are linked toa shooting that injured a man during a recent carjacking.

news.title: Metro Atlanta deputy accused of whipping foster child 20 times
news.summary: Andrew Williams, 31, resigned from the Bartow County Sheriff’s Office during the investigation.

news.title: Atlanta Airport shuttle manager stabbed in face protecting coworker
news.summary: A shuttle manager who was stabbed while trying to protect a co-worker at Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport is suing the City of Atlanta.

news.title: Officials identify 75-year-old community volunteer shot in East Point
news.summary: East Point police are asking for the public’s help identifying the person or people responsible for the shooting of a 75-year-old woman who was helping distribute food to people in need.

news.title: 1 person dead after shooting in Decatur, police say
news.summary: Police located a man suffering from a gunshot wound, who they said later died of his injuries.

news.title: 75-year-old woman shot while delivering food identified
news.summary: A 75-year-old woman who was shot while volunteering at an outdoor food distribution in East Point on Wednesday morning has been publicly identified.

news.title: Atlanta police seek the public's help to identify a person in July 7 homicide case
news.summary: Submit tips anonymously for a potential $5,000 reward.

news.title: Person dies after being hit by CSX train in Union City
news.summary: A train hit and killed a person walking on the tracks in Union City early Thursday morning, sparking an investigation by local law enforcement.

news.title: Man dead after shooting on Flat Shoals Road in Decatur
news.summary: DeKalb County authorities are investigating a Thursday morning shooting in Decatur that left one man dead.

news.title: Attempted carjacking at Gwinnett apartments leads to shooting
news.summary: Gwinnett County detectives are hunting for multiple suspects after a gunman shot a man during an attempted carjacking Tuesday night at an apartment complex.

news.title: Cold case murder: Decatur woman identified nearly 43 years after remains found in Florida Everglades
news.summary: While detectives have identified the victim through advances in DNA technology and genetic genealogy, the circumstances surrounding her death remain a mystery.
